servinfo.title: Immobilizer Control System Self-Diagnosis Function
servinfo.ptxt: ECM and keyless start control module monitor each of the input and output signals of the immobilizer system, and they are equipped with a self-diagnosis function which displays DTC when an abnormality is detected.
Also, when an abnormality is detected, immobilizer indicator light blinks or lights up to warn the driver basically.
The basic lighting patterns indicate the following.

item.ptxt: Lighting: DTC is detected but engine can be started
Blinking: DTC is detected and engine cannot be started
